brief: Add pagination to GET /bookmarks with ?page=N&limit=M query parameters. Default limit=20, page=1. Response wraps data in {data, total, page, limit}.
acceptance_criteria: Response shape: { data: [...], total: N, page: N, limit: N }
oracle_test: Create 5 bookmarks. GET /bookmarks?page=1&limit=2 returns 2 items with total=5. GET /bookmarks?page=3&limit=2 returns 1 item.
